summary: Tested Calculator Admin Panel v4 features: 3 tabs (Perustiedot/Lisäpalvelut/Paketit), addon CRUD, package management, and area step changes. Kattomaalaus slider works correctly. ISSUE FOUND: Julkisivumaalaus area step still uses size_cards instead of slider with dont_know_options.

critical.issue: Julkisivumaalaus area step type is 'size_cards' instead of 'slider' with dont_know_options
critical.expected: type: 'slider' with dont_know_options array and title containing 'pohjapinta-ala'
critical.actual: type: 'size_cards' with options array, title: 'Kuinka suuri talo on?'

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin/jbadmin2024)
Admin login rejects invalid credentials
Public /api/calculator-config returns 6 services
Admin /api/admin/calculator-config accessible with token
All 6 services have 3 packages (Perus, Suositeltu, Premium)
All packages have correct structure with addon_ids array
Suositeltu package has default=true in all services
All addons have valid group field (esityot/tarvittaessa/lisapalvelut)
Kattomaalaus area step type is 'slider'
Kattomaalaus area step has 4 dont_know_options
Kattomaalaus area title contains 'pohjapinta-ala'
All services have auto_triggers with correct structure
Admin panel: Laskuri tab shows calculator config
Admin panel: Expanding service shows 3 tabs (Perustiedot, Lisäpalvelut, Paketit)
Admin panel: Lisäpalvelut tab shows addons with all fields (name, hint, price, group, badge, warning)
Admin panel: 'Lisää palvelu' button visible for adding new addons
Admin panel: Paketit tab shows 3 packages with checkbox grid of addons
Admin panel: 'Aseta oletukseksi' button works, 'Oletus' badge shown on default package
Admin panel: Tallenna button visible for saving config
Calculator: Full flow works end-to-end with packages and auto-triggers
Calculator: Package selector shows 3 packages with 'ENITEN VALITTU' badge on Suositeltu
Calculator: Addons grouped into ESITYÖT, TARVITTAESSA, LISÄPALVELUT sections
Calculator: Badges 'SUOSITELTU' and 'USEIN VALITAAN' displayed on addons
Calculator: Warning message shown when deselecting addon with warning field
Calculator: Auto-triggers fire correctly (e.g., 'Pieniä epätasaisuuksia' enables 'Halkeamien korjaus')
Calculator: Price result shows kotitalousvähennys
Calculator: CTAs 'Pyydä tarkka tarjous (maksuton)' and 'Lähetä kuvat nopeaa arviota varten' visible
failed_tests: Julkisivumaalaus area step type should be 'slider' - FAILED (got 'size_cards')
Julkisivumaalaus area step should have dont_know_options - FAILED (got 0 options)
action_items: FIX REQUIRED: Change Julkisivumaalaus area step from 'size_cards' to 'slider' with dont_know_options in /app/backend/server.py lines 1646-1656
Update Julkisivumaalaus area step title to 'Kuinka suuri talo on? (pohjapinta-ala)'
Add dont_know_options array with fallback size categories (e.g., Pieni ~75m², Keskikokoinen ~125m², Suuri ~175m², Erittäin suuri ~250m²)
critical_code_review_comments: Julkisivumaalaus area step config at lines 1646-1656 needs to match Kattomaalaus pattern (lines 1715-1730)
Current Julkisivumaalaus area step uses size_cards with fixed options, should use slider with min/max/default/step/unit and dont_know_options

success_rate.backend: 83% - 10/12 tests passed (2 failed for Julkisivumaalaus area step)

seed_data_creation: Calculator config auto-seeded with packages, auto_triggers, and grouped addons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested admin panel v4 features. All features work EXCEPT Julkisivumaalaus area step which still uses size_cards instead of slider. The fix requires changing server.py lines 1646-1656 to match the Kattomaalaus pattern (lines 1715-1730). Key data-testids: calc-service-{id}, admin-addon-{id}, admin-package-{id}, add-addon-{id}, calc-save-btn, area-slider, dont-know-btn, dontknow-{id}.
